title: From Genetic Variant to Wet-lab: Accelerating the path from hypothesis to experiment
summary: Google DeepMind's Antigravity demonstrates an agentic workbench for accelerating biological research workflows. The platform orchestrates frontier models and integrates access to over 30 scientific databases including UniProt, PubChem, and ChEMBL to enable researchers to move from genetic observation to wet-lab experiment design in minutes.
